Dark IBM-Carbon reshell of MediaMonkey 5's Flat Monkey, with a free accent colour picker (default sunflower `#FFE000`) and accent-tinted track-list selection.

### Added
- Dark-only IBM Carbon greyscale shell — window `#161616`, panels `#262626`, borders `#393939`, selection `#525252`, text `#f4f4f4`.
- Free **Accent color** picker in *Tools > Options > Skin* (default sunflower `#FFE000`), with a readability guard.
- Accent-tinted selection for track/file lists — consistent on hover and non-hover.
- Size option (Small / Normal / Large).

### Install
Download `Flat Monkey Dark.mmip` below → MediaMonkey **Tools > Add-ons > Add…** → pick it → **Tools > Options > Skin** and select **Flat Monkey Dark**.
